title: INtravel
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtravel, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Antarctica reading list: The 8 best books to read before a trip
items.description: It pays to do your homework before a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Antarctica

items.title: Points and miles aren’t just for the good times. They can be a godsend in an emergency, too
items.description: When a family emergency struck thousands of miles from home, points and miles saved me and my husband.

items.title: Deal of the day: Fly to Jamaica for only 8,000 American Airlines AAdvantage miles
items.description: Ready for some fun in the Caribbean sun? You can visit Jamaica for less with this deal.

items.title: Chase Sapphire Reserve vs. Amex Gold: A top luxury travel card against a popular card for foodies
items.description: The American Express Gold is one of the only mid-tier cards that can give the Chase Sapphire Reserve a run for its money. Here's how they stack up.

items.title: How to redeem American Airlines AAdvantage miles for maximum value
items.description: A look at the best sweet spot redemptions in the American Airlines AAdvantage program.
